summary: Iteration 43: Verified Military/Hospice verification flow - All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend verification modal tested successfully. Admin VerificationsTab shows toggle approval and Notify Benefactor button working correctly.

issues: Military plan shows 'Subscribe' instead of 'Verify & Subscribe' when user is already verified for that tier - this is correct behavior but may confuse users who don't remember submitting verification

seed_data_creation: Test verification created via pytest, then approved and notified via Playwright UI test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verification flow fully tested. Test user (fulltest@test.com) has approved military verification. Founder CarryOn has approved+notified military verification. Hospice plan Verify & Subscribe modal opens correctly with 'Hospice Enrollment Documentation' doc type.

tested_features.subscription_plans_endpoint: PASS - Returns 6 plans + 4 beneficiary_plans with quarterly/annual prices
tested_features.verification_upload_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/verification/upload accepts tier_requested, doc_type, file_data, file_name
tested_features.admin_verifications_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/verifications returns list with id, user_id, tier_requested, status, doc_type
tested_features.admin_verification_review: PASS - POST /api/admin/verifications/{id}/review with action=approve updates status
tested_features.admin_verification_notify: PASS - POST /api/admin/verifications/{id}/notify sends support message to benefactor
tested_features.verification_status_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/verification/status returns user's verification status
tested_features.hospice_verify_subscribe_button: PASS - Shows 'Verify & Subscribe' button with shield icon
tested_features.hospice_verification_modal: PASS - Opens modal with 'Hospice Verification' title and 'Hospice Enrollment Documentation' doc type
tested_features.military_verify_subscribe_button: PASS (when not verified) - Shows 'Verify & Subscribe' button; Shows 'Subscribe' when already verified
tested_features.admin_verifications_tab: PASS - Shows verification cards with toggle approval button and Notify Benefactor button
tested_features.admin_toggle_approval: PASS - Toggle button changes from 'Approve' to 'Approved' state
tested_features.admin_notify_benefactor: PASS - Button appears after approval, sends notification, shows 'Benefactor notified' indicator

verification_flow_screenshots.admin_verify_tab: .screenshots/admin_verify_tab.png - Shows VerificationsTab with approval toggle and View Doc buttons
verification_flow_screenshots.after_approve_click: .screenshots/after_approve_click.png - Shows 'Notify Benefactor' button appeared after approval

mocked_api_note: Beta mode is ON - Stripe checkout returns 'Subscriptions are free during beta period'. Verification upload accepts base64 file data.
